parties.name: DU LAC, KATERINA GUINEVERE 55 MASON STREET, #426 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar Mar-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for an Order for Change of Gender and issuance of a New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: John Dearman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Katerina Guinevere Du Lac present in court.
Declaration of Physician attached to Original Petition.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

No objections to the proposed gender change and issuance of a new birth certificate were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations of the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition Gender Change from male to female an issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Order for Change of Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate signed by the court.
